song.title: Something Every Heart Is Loving
song.author: Gerhardt Tersteegen
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 E
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C Em Something every heart is loving. .C Em If not Jesus, none can rest; .F G Em A Lord, my heart to Thee is given; .Dm G C Take it, for it loves Thee best.
[V2] .C Em Thus I cast the world behind me; .C Em Jesus most beloved shall be; .F G Em A Beauteous more than all things beauteous. .Dm G C He alone is joy to me.
[V3] .C Em Bright with all eternal radiance .C Em Is the glory of Thy face; .F G Em A Thou art loving, sweet and tender, .Dm G C Full of pity, full of grace.
[V4] .C Em When I hated, Thou didst love me, .C Em Shedd'st for me Thy precious blood; .F G Em A Still Thou lovest, lovest ever. .Dm G C Shall I not love Thee, my God?
[V5] .C Em Keep my heart still faithful to Thee, .C Em That my earthly life may be .F G Em A But a shadow to that glory .Dm G C Of my hidden life in Thee.
[E] 1) Something every heart is loving. If not Jesus, none can rest; Lord, my heart to Thee is given; Take it, for it loves Thee best. 2) Thus I cast the world behind me; Jesus most beloved shall be; Beauteous more than all things beauteous. He alone is joy to me. 3) Bright with all eternal radiance Is the glory of Thy face; Thou art loving, sweet and tender, Full of pity, full of grace. 4) When I hated, Thou didst love me, Shedd'st for me Thy precious blood; Still Thou lovest, lovest ever. Shall I not love Thee, my God? 5) Keep my heart still faithful to Thee, That my earthly life may be But a shadow to that glory Of my hidden life in Thee.
